debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
primes : List ℕ
h_precond : findExponents_precond n primes
⊢ findExponents_postcond n primes (findExponents n primes h_precond) h_precond

failed_attempts:
have h3 : primes.all (fun p => Nat.Prime p) := h_precond.2.2.1
  have h4 : List.Nodup primes := h_precond.2.2.2
  clear h_precond
  induction primes with
  | nil => contradiction
  | cons p ps ih =>
    simp_all [findExponents, findExponents_postcond]
    <;> cases n
    <;> simp_all [Nat.Prime, Nat.succ_pos]

  clear h_precond
  induction primes with
  | nil => contradiction
  | cons p ps ih =>
    simp_all [findExponents_postcond, List.foldl, List.all, List.any]
    <;> cases countFactor n p 0 <;> simp_all
    <;> try { omega }
    <;> try { apply Nat.Prime.pos; exact h3.head }
    <;> try { apply ih <;> simp_all }

have : n = p ^ e * n' := by
        revert n n'
        generalize hn : n = n₀
        generalize hn' : n' = n₁
        induction e with
        | zero => simp_all
        | succ e ih =>
          simp_all [Nat.pow_succ]
          omega
      rw [this]
      have := ih (by assumption)
      simp_all
    · constructor
      · -- Second conjunct: all primes in result are in input list
        simp_all
      · -- Third conjunct: every prime in input appears in result
        intro q hq
        cases' hq with rfl hq
        · simp_all
        · specialize ih hq
          simp_all
